package rulefixtures

// scenario for range_over_string_by_index: `for i := 0; i < len(s); i++ { c := s[i] }` on strings that should iterate runes
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule629NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario629Negative(records []Rule629NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
